- Construction and infrastructure companies in investment phase
- IT companies providing services to non-residents
- Companies after major capital investments

#### What we do in VAT refund
- **Document audit** — We verify invoices, contracts, deeds, customs declarations against refund requirements. Identify risks BEFORE filing.
- **Application preparation** — We prepare the application and document package per State Tax Committee requirements. Minimize chances of rejection.
- **Filing with tax authority** — We file documents through the taxpayer's online cabinet, monitor application registration.
- **Audit support** — We respond to inspector queries, defend the company's position, help with additional documents.
- **Rejection defense** — On rejection or partial refund, we prepare objections, appeals to higher authority and court claims if needed.
- **Receipt control** — We monitor refund crediting to the account, help unblock in case of technical delays.

#### How the refund procedure works
1. **Audit & preparation** — Document analysis for the period, error identification and fixing, refund amount calculation. 1-2 weeks.
2. **Application filing** — Document package formation, filing with the State Tax Committee through online cabinet. 1-2 days.
3. **Desk audit** — Tax authority verifies the refund's legitimacy. By law — up to 60 days. We support all queries. 30-60 days.
4. **Decision & refund** — STC decides on refund (full / partial / rejection). On positive decision, funds arrive on the account. Up to 10 days.

#### Why us for VAT refund
- Helped clients refund 200+ billion UZS in VAT
- Know all nuances and pitfalls of the procedure — anticipate them
- Support at all stages — from documents to account credit
- Experience defending in disputed cases, including in court
- Possible work for percentage of refund — payment only on success
- Confidentiality and fast communication — we respond to tax queries the same day

#### VAT refund service cost
Two formats are possible: fixed price (covers all stages) or percentage of actually refunded amount (payment only on success). Specific scheme depends on refund volume and case complexity.

#### VAT refund FAQ
**How long does VAT refund take in Uzbekistan?**
Desk audit by law takes up to 60 days from filing. After positive decision, funds arrive within 10 business days. Total — 2-3 months from filing to receiving money.

**What is the minimum VAT amount to refund?**
No legal minimum — theoretically you can apply for any amount. Practically, for process efficiency, we recommend filing for amounts of 50 million UZS and above.

**What's needed for exporter VAT refund?**
Contract with non-resident buyer, invoices for export operations (with 0% VAT), shipping documents (customs declaration, CMR/bill of lading), bank statements showing currency receipt, supplier input VAT documents. Full list depends on export type.

**Can VAT be refunded if the return is already filed?**
Yes. The refund application is filed separately from the return, usually after submission. Statute of limitations is 3 years from the moment VAT overpayment occurred.

**What to do on rejection?**
First we analyze the rejection reasons in the inspection act. Prepare objections, if needed — appeal to higher tax authority, on further rejection — court claim. We have successful experience challenging rejections.

### Accounting outsourcing
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/services/accounting

Full accounting handled by professionals — without an in-house team

#### What is accounting outsourcing
Accounting outsourcing is the transfer of accounting and tax record functions to an external professional firm. Instead of hiring an in-house chief accountant and team, you get a team of internationally certified experts at a fixed monthly fee.
In Uzbekistan, accounting outsourcing is increasingly in demand — especially for small and mid-sized businesses, foreign offices, IT companies, startups. Main advantages: salary and infrastructure savings, no risks from one person's errors, always up-to-date expertise on changing legislation.
Leader Audit provides the full spectrum of accounting services — from small company bookkeeping to supporting large holdings with branches and subsidiaries. We work under NAS and IFRS, perform statement transformation, payroll calculation and HR records.

#### Who's a fit for accounting outsourcing
- Small and mid-sized business — cheaper than in-house
- Startups and IT companies — expertise from day one without hiring costs
- Foreign companies and representative offices — knowledge of local law
- Companies with seasonal activity — pay-as-you-work
- Those whose chief accountant has resigned — fast handover and continuation
- Companies after tax issues — accounting restoration and process setup
- Holdings with multiple legal entities — single accounting standard
- Businesses with international activity — parallel IFRS records

#### What's included in accounting outsourcing
- **Bookkeeping** — Full accounting and tax records under NAS — all source documents, postings, registers.
- **Records restoration** — We restore records after data loss, accountant resignation or previous team's errors.
- **Reporting** — Preparation and filing of all required reports — tax, statistical, financial — within deadlines.
- **IFRS transformation** — IFRS reporting in parallel with NAS — for foreign investors and parent companies.
- **Payroll & taxes** — Salary, vacation, sick leave, withholdings, taxes and contributions for all staff, payslips.
- **HR records** — Workbooks, orders, timesheets, HR documents per Uzbek labor law.
- **Electronic document flow** — EDF setup and operation — invoices, deeds, contracts in electronic form.
- **Tax consultations** — Continuous support on tax matters — at no extra cost for retainer clients.

#### How we transition a client to outsourcing
1. **Acquaintance & current state audit** — Analyze current accounting state, identify issues, estimate scope. 3-5 days.
2. **Contract & transition plan** — Sign contract, NDA, agree on regulations, plan handover. 2-3 days.
3. **Handover** — Get access to accounting system, database, documents. Restore missing items. 1-2 weeks.
4. **Operations start** — Take over accounting, form regular reporting, set up communication.
5. **Continuous support** — Monthly bookkeeping, reporting, Q&A, tax support.

#### Why Leader Audit for accounting outsourcing
- 13 years of experience in Uzbek accounting and tax records
- Team with international CAP, CIPA, DipIFR certifications
- Ministry of Finance license — guarantee of professionalism
- Liability insurance — compensation for errors
- Parallel IFRS records — for foreign investors
- Single account manager — no bureaucracy or handoffs
- Transparent contract pricing — no hidden fees
- Confidentiality — NDA with each client

#### Cost of accounting outsourcing
Cost depends on transactions per month, company size, employee count, accounting complexity and additional tasks (IFRS, HR records, payroll). Fixed retainer or hourly billing available. Calculation after a brief accounting state audit.

#### Accounting outsourcing FAQ
**Is outsourcing more expensive or cheaper than in-house accounting?**
For SMBs, outsourcing is almost always cheaper: you pay for actual work, not for an in-house accountant's salary + taxes + workspace + software + resignation risk. For very large companies with high transaction volumes, an in-house team may sometimes be more cost-effective.

**Who is responsible for accounting errors?**
Leader Audit bears full professional responsibility for service quality, backed by an insurance policy. On error, we cover fines and penalties at our expense.

**Can parallel IFRS records be maintained?**
Yes, we regularly maintain parallel IFRS records for companies with foreign investors or parent firms. We also transform statements from NAS to IFRS for past periods.

**Is it safe to outsource accounting?**
We sign NDAs with each client, work with secure communication channels, limit data access to project specialists only. In 13 years of operation — not a single data leak case.

**What if my accounting is in complete disarray?**
This is the most common situation when transitioning to outsourcing. We perform records restoration — recreate the database, restore missing documents, fix past errors, then take over for ongoing operations.

## Блог / Blog

### Statutory Audit in Uzbekistan 2026: Complete Guide
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/obligatory-audit-guide-2026
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-15; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 8 min; Audit

Who in Uzbekistan must undergo annual audit, what deadlines and sanctions exist for non-compliance, how to choose an auditor and how much it costs — all explained with the latest 2026 changes.

Statutory audit is one of the most important and frequently misunderstood procedures for businesses in Uzbekistan. Many companies learn that they are required to undergo an audit just a couple of weeks before filing their statements, and they end up in a state of panic, overpaying and making mistakes. In this guide, we break down everything an owner and a chief financial officer need to know.
## Who is required to undergo an audit in 2026
Pursuant to the Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan "On Auditing Activities" and its implementing regulations, a statutory audit is mandatory for:
- All joint-stock companies (JSCs) — both public and private, regardless of size
- Banks, credit institutions and microfinance organizations
- Insurance and reinsurance companies
- Investment funds, mutual funds and pension funds
- Exchanges and professional participants of the securities market
- Organizations with a state share of more than 50%
- Large companies exceeding the thresholds for revenue/assets/headcount (for current values, see the applicable legislation)
- Companies required to publish consolidated financial statements under IFRS
## Audit timelines
The audit must be completed before the annual financial statements are filed — for most companies this is the end of April of the year following the reporting year. Given that a quality audit takes 3-8 weeks depending on the size of the company, we recommend starting the process in January-February.
## What happens if you fail to undergo an audit on time
The consequences depend on the type of company:
- Fines under the Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan on Administrative Liability
- Inability to file annual statements within the established deadlines
- Blocking of certain operations (for financial institutions)
- Loss of license — for banks, insurance companies and investment funds
- Tax risks during subsequent inspections — without an audit report, the company's position in disputes is weakened
- Inability to participate in government tenders and to obtain bank loans
## How to choose an auditor
When choosing an audit firm in Uzbekistan, check the following:
1. A valid license from the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan — mandatory
2. Professional liability insurance — a guarantee of compensation for losses in the event of an auditor's error
3. Experience in your industry — healthcare, IT, manufacturing and trade each have their own specifics
4. International certifications (CAP, CIPA, DipIFR/ACCA) held by the lead auditors
5. Transparent pricing — a fixed amount stated in the contract, with no "surcharges for volume"
6. Willingness to sign a non-disclosure agreement (NDA)
7. Reviews and references from other clients in your field
## How much does a statutory audit cost
The cost of an audit in Tashkent varies within a wide range depending on the scope of operations, the complexity of the financial statements (NAS or IFRS), the industry, the number of business transactions and the presence of branches. Request written commercial proposals from several auditors and compare not only the price, but also the scope of work.
## What a quality audit includes
A professional audit is not merely a check of the statements for formal compliance. A quality audit includes:
- Analysis of the company's internal control system
- Testing of material business transactions
- Verification of the correct application of accounting standards (NAS or IFRS)
- Analysis of tax risks and calculations
- Assessment of compliance with legal requirements
- An audit report — an official document for government authorities
- A detailed report on the violations found, with specific recommendations
## Audit preparation checklist
1. Closing the accounting period and preparing the trial balance
2. Preparation of financial statements under NAS (and IFRS, if applicable)
3. Conducting an inventory count of assets and liabilities
4. Collecting source documents for material transactions
5. Checking contracts with counterparties for completeness and accuracy
6. Reconciliations with debtors and creditors
7. Preparation of tax calculations and returns for the period
8. Appointing a person within the company responsible for communication with the auditors
## Conclusion
A statutory audit is not a "box-ticking" exercise for the government, but a tool for protecting your business from tax, financial and reputational risks. A quality audit conducted in a timely manner makes it possible to identify and eliminate problems before they become costly. If you still have questions or need a consultation on preparing for an audit, the specialists at Leader Audit are ready to help — the first consultation is free.

### VAT Refund in Uzbekistan: Step-by-Step Guide
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/vat-refund-uzbekistan
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-10; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 10 min; Taxes

VAT refund from the Uzbek budget is a real opportunity to recover significant funds, but the procedure is full of nuances. We cover the entire path from document preparation to receiving funds.

A VAT refund is one of the most beneficial, yet also one of the most complex, financial instruments for businesses in Uzbekistan. Based on our experience handling refunds totalling more than 200 billion UZS, roughly a third of all applications are rejected because of technical errors. This article is a complete guide: who can reclaim VAT, what documents are required, how long the procedure takes, and how to avoid the most common mistakes.
## Who is eligible for a VAT refund
Under the Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan, a VAT refund from the budget is available in the following situations:
- An excess of input VAT over output VAT (when you pay suppliers more VAT than you collect from customers)
- Export of goods and services (the 0% VAT rate applies, and the input VAT is recoverable)
- Investment activity — the import of equipment and materials for the implementation of investment projects
- Sale of goods (services) at a reduced (preferential) rate
## Who reclaims VAT most often
1. Exporters (metallurgy, textiles, IT services, agricultural produce, finished goods)
2. Importers with a large volume of input VAT from suppliers and customs
3. Companies in the investment phase (construction of plants and infrastructure)
4. Manufacturers with a long production cycle (large purchases of raw materials before shipment of finished goods)
5. IT companies providing services to non-residents
6. Companies following major capital investments
## Documents required for a VAT refund
The basic set of documents for a VAT refund includes:
- An application for a VAT refund in the prescribed form
- The VAT return for the period
- Electronic invoices (ESF) from suppliers for the input VAT
- Contracts with suppliers and customers
- Work completion acts / consignment (waybill) notes
- For exporters: the customs cargo declaration (GTD), the CMR, and bank statements confirming receipt of foreign-currency proceeds
- For investment projects: documents confirming the status of the investment project
## The step-by-step procedure
### Step 1. Analysis and preparation (1-2 weeks)
Before submitting the application, you must carry out a review of the documents: verify that the ESF are correct, that transactions have been recorded properly, and that all primary documents are in place. At this stage, errors that could lead to a rejection are eliminated.
### Step 2. Submission of the application (1-2 days)
The application and the set of documents are submitted electronically through the taxpayer's personal account on the website of the State Tax Committee (STC). The application is registered on the day it is submitted.
### Step 3. Desk audit (up to 60 days)
The tax inspector reviews whether the claimed refund is justified. They may request additional documents and explanations. It is important to respond promptly — a delay in responding extends the duration of the audit and weakens your position.
### Step 4. Decision and transfer of funds (up to 10 days)
Based on the results of the audit, the STC makes a decision: a full refund, a partial refund, or a rejection. If the decision is positive, the funds are credited to the company's settlement account within 10 business days.
## The top 7 common mistakes in VAT refunds
1. Discrepancies between the data in the return, the ESF, and the primary documents
2. A missing or incorrectly drawn-up contract with a non-resident (for exports)
3. Late receipt of foreign-currency export proceeds
4. Use of incorrect commodity codes (TN VED)
5. Unrecorded adjustment invoices
6. No confirmation that the supplier is registered as a VAT payer
7. Exceeding the statute of limitations (3 years from the date the overpayment arose)
## What to do if your refund is denied
If the STC has denied the refund in full or in part, there are several levels of recourse:
1. Objections to the audit report — filed with the same inspectorate within the established time limit
2. A complaint to a higher tax authority — for example, to the Republic's STC
3. A judicial appeal against the decision — before the Economic Court
In our practice, rejections are successfully challenged in more than 70% of cases — the key is to build the argument competently and to prepare the documents correctly.
## Is it worth handling the refund yourself
If the refund amount is small (up to 30-50 million UZS) and the transactions are standard, you can try doing it yourself. For large amounts, export transactions, or complex cases, we recommend engaging a specialised firm — the cost of its services pays for itself many times over thanks to a higher probability of obtaining the refund and shorter processing times.
## Conclusion
A VAT refund is not a privilege but a company's lawful right, which the state is obliged to honour. However, without proper preparation and support, the process often turns into long months of correspondence with the tax authority and an ultimate rejection. Leader Audit has specialised in VAT refunds since 2013 and has helped clients reclaim more than 200 billion UZS. If you have a VAT overpayment, or you are an exporter or investor, get in touch — we will assess your refund prospects free of charge.

### ISA vs NAS in Uzbekistan: What to Choose for Your Company
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/isa-vs-nas-uzbekistan
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-05; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 7 min; Accounting

Many companies in Uzbekistan face a dilemma: maintain accounts under national NAS standards or directly under international IFRS?

For accountants and finance directors in Uzbekistan, the choice between national (NAS) and international (IFRS) accounting standards is one of the key questions. Understanding the difference helps avoid costly mistakes and structure financial reporting properly.
## What NAS and IFRS are
NAS (National Accounting Standards) are the standards of the Republic of Uzbekistan, developed by the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Uzbekistan. They are mandatory for all resident companies and govern the maintenance of accounting records and the preparation of financial statements.
IFRS (International Financial Reporting Standards) are global standards developed by the IFRS Board (IASB). They are applied in more than 140 countries worldwide and serve as the "common language" of business for investors, banks and regulators at the international level.
ISA (International Standards on Auditing) are the standards for conducting audits associated with IFRS. If a company prepares its financial statements under IFRS, the audit is performed in accordance with ISA.
## Who is required to apply IFRS in Uzbekistan
- Banks and credit institutions
- Insurance companies
- Professional participants of the securities market
- Public companies whose shares are traded on an exchange
- Subsidiaries of foreign holdings (at the request of the parent company)
- Companies attracting foreign investors
All other companies keep their records under NAS, but may voluntarily maintain parallel records under IFRS.
## Key differences between NAS and IFRS
### 1. Principles vs rules
IFRS is based on principles and requires professional judgement. NAS is closer to rules — most situations have clearly prescribed procedures. This simplifies the accountant's work but reduces flexibility.
### 2. Valuation of assets
Under IFRS, assets are often measured at fair value with regular revaluation. Under NAS, historical cost with depreciation prevails.
### 3. Financial statements
IFRS requires more detailed disclosures, mandatory explanatory notes, and a cash flow statement in expanded form. NAS is limited to standard forms 1, 2 and their appendices.
### 4. Accounting for leases, impairment, deferred taxes
These areas differ substantially. For example, under IFRS (IFRS 16) almost all lease agreements are recognised on the balance sheet as an asset and a liability — whereas under NAS operating leases are more often accounted for off-balance-sheet.
## When parallel accounting is needed
Parallel accounting under NAS and IFRS is maintained by companies that:
- Have a parent company or shareholders abroad
- Attract foreign investment or are planning an IPO
- Obtain loans from international banks
- Are preparing to sell the business to an international buyer
- Want to apply a more progressive accounting policy for management purposes
## Transformation vs parallel accounting
There are two ways to obtain IFRS financial statements:
1. Parallel accounting — every transaction is recorded simultaneously under NAS and IFRS. More expensive in ongoing maintenance, but provides accurate data in real time
2. Transformation — records are kept under NAS, and at the end of the period (quarter/year) they are restated into IFRS. Cheaper, but requires considerable effort at the moment of transformation and is less accurate
## What to choose for your business
- Small and medium-sized local business — NAS only, that is sufficient
- Company with foreign investors — parallel accounting or regular transformation
- An IT startup with plans to enter the international market — IFRS straight away as the primary accounting basis
- A company preparing for sale — transformation for the last 2-3 years
- Bank/insurance company/joint-stock company — IFRS plus NAS, mandatory
## Conclusion
The choice between NAS and IFRS is not an "either/or", but a question of the right strategy for your business. Most successful medium-sized companies in Uzbekistan maintain parallel accounting or regularly transform their financial statements — this opens access to foreign financing, increases transparency for owners and simplifies the audit. If you are considering a transition to IFRS or need a transformation, Leader Audit specialists holding the international CAP, CIPA, DipIFR certifications will help develop the optimal solution.

### Transfer Pricing in Uzbekistan: What You Need to Know
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/transfer-pricing-uzbekistan
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-03-28; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 9 min; Taxes

Transactions between related companies are under close scrutiny of Uzbek tax authorities.

Transfer pricing (TP) is the setting of prices in transactions between interdependent (related) companies. In Uzbekistan, as in most countries, the tax authorities keep a close watch on such transactions, because there is a risk that companies use them to shift profits into lower-tax jurisdictions or between related parties for the purpose of optimization.
## What qualifies as a controlled transaction
Under the Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan, the following are recognized as controlled transactions:
- Transactions between interdependent parties (companies within the same group, affiliated parties)
- Transactions with residents of countries on the "blacklist" of offshore jurisdictions
- Foreign-trade transactions in exchange-traded commodities (oil, metals, agricultural products)
- Transactions exceeding the established turnover thresholds
## When transfer pricing documentation is required
Preparing transfer pricing documentation is mandatory for controlled transactions when the thresholds for the transaction amount and/or the company's overall turnover are exceeded. The specific thresholds change over time — check the current values in the version of the Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan now in force.
## Methods for determining the market price
The Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan recognizes five methods for determining the market price — the same as those in the OECD standards:
1. Comparable uncontrolled price method (CUP) — comparison with the prices of similar goods on the open market
2. Resale price method (RPM) — based on the markup applied on resale
3. Cost plus method — based on the cost of production plus a normal profit
4. Transactional net margin method (TNMM) — based on profitability indicators
5. Profit split method — for integrated operations
## What transfer pricing documentation includes
- A description of the group of companies and the interdependent parties
- An analysis of the functions, assets and risks of the parties to the transaction (FAR analysis)
- A description of each controlled transaction
- A justification of the chosen pricing method
- Financial calculations confirming that the prices conform to the market level
- Benchmarking — comparison with public data on comparable companies
## Risks of having no documentation
If transfer pricing documentation has not been prepared, or has been prepared poorly, then during a tax audit the company may face:
- Additional assessment of profit tax on the difference between the actual and the "market" price
- Additional assessment of VAT on the portion of the amount not accounted for
- Penalties for violating transfer pricing rules
- Late-payment interest for the untimely payment of taxes
- The inability to defend itself without a documented, substantiated position
## Common transfer pricing mistakes
1. Using a single method for all transactions without justifying the choice
2. Weak benchmarking — an insufficient number of comparable companies
3. Ignoring differences in the functions and risks of the parties to the transaction
4. Preparing documentation "after the fact" once a notice of audit has been received
5. The absence of a coordinated transfer pricing policy at the group level
6. Technical errors in the calculations and formulas
## How to protect yourself against transfer pricing risks
1. Implement a transfer pricing policy at the group level
2. Prepare documentation in advance — before filing the tax return
3. Update benchmarking regularly (at least once a year)
4. Use specialized databases to find comparable companies
5. Engage professional transfer pricing consultants
6. Consider the possibility of an Advance Pricing Agreement (APA) with the tax authority
## Conclusion
Transfer pricing is not a one-off exercise but an ongoing practice. High-quality transfer pricing documentation protects the company from substantial additional assessments during tax audits and makes it possible to use lawful opportunities to optimize intra-group transactions. If your company works with affiliated counterparties or has an international structure, it is worth conducting an audit of your current transfer pricing policy — Leader Audit will help with preparing the documentation and defending your position before the tax authorities.

### Tax Inspection in Uzbekistan: Readiness Checklist
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/tax-audit-checklist
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-03-20; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 11 min; Taxes

Tax inspection is a stressful situation for any business. By preparing in advance, you significantly reduce adjustment risks.

Over 13 years of practice we have supported hundreds of tax audits and seen how the very same company, with the very same turnover, can end up with a clean report or with multi-billion UZS additional assessments — it all comes down to the quality of preparation. This checklist sets out practical steps, from spotting the signs of an upcoming audit to defending your position after the audit report.
## Signs of an upcoming tax audit
The tax authority rarely shows up "without warning." There are usually indicators:
- Receipt of a request to provide documents (desk audits)
- A request for explanations regarding specific transactions
- Summoning the director or the chief accountant to the inspectorate
- A preliminary notice of an upcoming audit
- Sharp changes in tax indicators when filing reports (a risk indicator)
- Transactions with problematic counterparties or with offshore jurisdictions
- Regular VAT refunds in large amounts
## Document preparation checklist
### Constituent documents
- Charter, founding agreement, amendments to the constituent documents
- Certificate of registration (Guvohnoma)
- Licenses (if the activity is subject to licensing)
- Documents on the state registration of changes in the Unified State Register of Legal Entities
### Accounting documents
- Order on the accounting policy
- General ledger and trial balances for the period under audit
- Accounting and tax registers
- Source documents for material transactions
- Contracts with counterparties (with annexes and supplementary agreements)
- Reconciliation statements with debtors and creditors
- Inventory count sheets
- Cash book and cash documents
### Tax documents
- Tax returns for the period under audit (VAT, profit tax, turnover tax, personal income tax, social tax, etc.)
- Tax calculations and explanatory notes to the returns
- Payment orders for the payment of taxes
- Electronic invoices (EIs) — all received and issued
- Documents on benefits and tax preferences
### HR documents
- Staffing table
- Employment agreements and contracts
- Orders on hiring, transfer, and dismissal
- Pay slips and payroll registers
- Time sheets
## Top 10 risks during a tax audit
1. Transactions with fictitious counterparties (absent at their registered address, non-VAT payers)
2. Discrepancies between the VAT and profit tax returns
3. Overstatement of expenses through questionable services (consulting, marketing)
4. Wrongful application of benefits and tax holidays
5. Errors in calculating tax on dividends and payments to non-residents
6. Violations in the accounting of fixed assets and intangible assets
7. Absence of source documents for material transactions
8. Incorrect documentation of travel and entertainment expenses
9. Discrepancies between cash revenue and EI data
10. Violations of labor legislation affecting the calculation of social tax
## What to do on the day of the audit
1. Verify the powers of the inspectors (the audit order, identification cards)
2. Appoint a person responsible for communication with the inspectorate (usually the accountant or an external consultant)
3. Do not give oral explanations — all answers in written form only
4. Make copies of all documents handed over
5. Record all requests from the inspectors and the response deadlines
6. Do not sign documents without legal review
7. Engage a tax consultant for complex matters
## After receiving the audit report
A tax audit report is not a verdict. You have several opportunities to challenge the conclusions:
1. Objections to the report — filed with the inspectorate within 10 working days of receiving the report. This is the first and most important stage of defense.
2. Complaint to a higher tax authority — against the inspectorate's decision, within the established deadlines.
3. Judicial appeal — in the Economic Court, if the previous stages did not produce a result.
Important: each subsequent stage is limited by deadlines, and missing a deadline means losing the right to a defense. That is why work on the report begins on the day it is received.
## Preventive measures are the best defense
1. Regular tax audit (at least once a year)
2. Transfer pricing documentation for controlled transactions
3. Thorough due diligence of counterparties before transactions
4. Retention of documents within the periods established by law
5. Timely updating of the accounting policy
6. Tax consulting on complex transactions
## Conclusion
A tax audit is not a catastrophe but a natural part of running any business. Companies that keep their accounts to a high standard and conduct regular tax audits pass inspections without material additional assessments. If you are preparing for an audit or have already received a report with additional assessments, Leader Audit will help defend your company's position. We have experience in challenging additional assessments amounting to hundreds of billions of UZS.

### Uzbekistan Tax Code 2026: Key Changes Every Accountant and Owner Should Know
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/en/blog/tax-code-2026-changes
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-30; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-30; 10 min; Taxes

Each year the Tax Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan receives amendments that change rates, benefits and administration rules. Here's a digest of key 2026 changes and how to apply them in practice.

The Uzbekistan Tax Code remains the most dynamic part of business legislation. Since 2020, when the new edition entered into force, amendments come out annually — and almost every one directly affects a company's bottom line. This article is a digest of the key 2026 changes and practical recommendations on how to apply them.
## Main tax rates in 2026
In 2026 base rates are preserved with targeted changes. This is convenient for planning, but it is important to track the application of benefits and special regimes.
### VAT
- Standard VAT rate — 12% (unchanged)
- 0% rate — for export operations (goods and services)
- Exemption — for select socially significant operations (medicine, education, culture per the official list)
- Mandatory VAT registration threshold — revised to reflect inflation
### Profit tax
- Standard rate — 15%
- For banks — 20%
- For producers of cement, polyethylene, mobile operators and the mining sector — 20%
- Dividends to non-residents — 10% (subject to applicable double tax treaties)
### Turnover tax (simplified regime)
Turnover tax remains an alternative to the general taxation regime for small business. The rate depends on the activity type and ranges from 4% to 25%. The threshold is indexed annually.
### Pension fund and social contributions
- Social tax for businesses — 12%
- For budget organizations — 25%
- Pension fund contributions from payroll — unchanged
- Minimum social tax base — revised in line with the minimum wage
## Uzbekistan IT Park benefits
IT Park residency remains one of the most attractive tax regimes in the country. Key benefits for residents are preserved:
- 0% profit tax on income from core activities
- 0% VAT for IT services exports
- Reduced pension fund rate for IT specialists
- Simplified work permits for foreign IT specialists
- Exemption from a number of mandatory payments
Important: to apply the benefits, the company must meet IT Park residency criteria for share of core revenue and types of activity. Misapplying the benefits can lead to back taxes with penalties and interest.
## Transfer pricing
Each year transfer pricing oversight in Uzbekistan strengthens. In 2026 the relevant points are:
- Expanded list of controlled transactions — including domestic transactions between related parties under certain conditions
- Lower thresholds for mandatory TP documentation submission
- Strengthened content requirements for TP documentation (Master File / Local File)
- Penalties introduced for non-submission of documentation in the prescribed timeframe — separate from substantive assessments
- Active use of CUP, net margin and profit split methods
If your company transacts with foreign related parties or residents of low-tax jurisdictions — TP documentation is no longer 'desirable' but mandatory. Documentation costs are dwarfed by potential adjustments.
## Tax administration: what's changing
The course toward digitalization of tax administration continues into 2026. Key trends:
- Expansion of the e-faktura system — mandatory for an ever wider range of taxpayers
- Development of a risk-based approach to selecting audit targets (low-risk companies are audited less often)
- Automated VAT control — discrepancies between purchase and sales books are detected automatically
- Strengthened oversight of self-employed and individuals with regular income
- Expanded options for electronic interaction with tax authorities through the personal cabinet
## VAT refund: simplifications and complications
VAT refund is one of the most pressing topics for exporters and investors. In 2026:
- Accelerated refund for compliant taxpayers with positive history is preserved
- Documentation requirements for export operations have tightened
- Automated control via the e-faktura system is widely applied
- Desk audit rigor on refund claims has increased — especially for large amounts
Practical recommendation: start preparing for a VAT refund 2-3 months before filing. A complete document review and resolution of discrepancies with the State Tax Committee database before filing saves months of refund time.
## What owners and CFOs should do
1. Run a tax audit for 2025 to understand the current risk picture
2. Update accounting policies to reflect 2026 changes
3. Verify compliance with criteria for any benefits applied (especially IT Park)
4. Prepare or update TP documentation for controlled transactions
5. Train the accounting team on the new rules
6. Set up regular monitoring of legislative changes — Ministry of Finance and State Tax Committee websites
## Conclusion
2026 changes to the Uzbekistan Tax Code are predominantly adaptive — tightening administration, digitalization, and enhanced transfer pricing oversight. Strategic rates are preserved, but 'the devil is in the details': misapplication of benefits, missed threshold updates, or late TP documentation can cost a company hundreds of millions of UZS.
Leader Audit tracks legislative changes in real time and helps clients adapt the tax function to new rules in a timely manner. If you need expert assessment of how the changes affect your business — request a free consultation.
> Tax planning is not a one-off December exercise but a continuous process running in parallel with operations. Then Tax Code amendments become opportunities, not threats.

## Кейсы / Case studies

### Our Cases & Projects
Anonymized case studies from Leader Audit's practice with concrete numbers. Client names are hidden under non-disclosure agreements (NDA), but the methods, risks and outcomes are real.

#### Manufacturing: VAT Refund (5 months)
Client profile: Manufacturer of construction materials, annual turnover 85 bn UZS, 320 employees, exports products to Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan.
Challenge: The company accumulated 22 bn UZS of input VAT surplus over 2 years due to major investments in a new plant. The Tax Committee twice refused the refund citing 'insufficient supporting documents' and 'discrepancies in reconciliation acts with suppliers'.
Approach:
1. Performed a complete inventory of invoices for 24 months, found and corrected 47 discrepancies between the purchase ledger and the State Tax Committee's automated system.
2. Prepared comprehensive documentation for export operations with translation of foreign trade contracts and customs declarations (CMR, invoices, transaction passports).
3. Agreed a new methodology for recognizing export operations for the 0% VAT rate with the State Tax Committee.
4. Supported the field VAT refund audit, attending every tax control event.
Outcome: VAT refunded: 18.4 bn UZS; Refund timeline: 5 months; Additional assessments: 0 UZS; Penalties prevented: 1.2 bn UZS.
The refund went through with no additional assessments or penalties. Methodological recommendations were also fixed, allowing the company to now recover VAT quarterly without delays.

#### IT: IFRS Transformation (11 weeks)
Client profile: Uzbekistan IT Park resident, fintech platform development, 95 employees, revenue 28 bn UZS, primary clients are CIS and Middle East banks.
Challenge: A foreign investor required 3 years of IFRS financial statements and an independent audit opinion to pass due diligence before an investment round. Deadline — 3 months until deal close.
Approach:
1. Collected and normalized data from three different accounting systems: 1C, internal CRM and cap table in Carta.
2. Applied IFRS 15 to revenue recognition for subscriptions (SaaS model) accounting for performance obligation separation.
3. Capitalized internal software development costs under IAS 38 and IFRS 38 with separation of research and development phases.
4. Audited the prepared statements under ISA, issued an unqualified opinion.
Outcome: Statements prepared: for 3 years; Opinion type: Unqualified; Project duration: 11 weeks; Investment raised: $4.5 M.
The deal closed on time. The investor noted the high quality of the statements and detailed disclosures under IFRS 9 (financial instruments) and IFRS 16 (leases).

#### Retail: Tax Consulting (4 months)
Client profile: Retail clothing chain, 18 stores across Uzbekistan, annual turnover 42 bn UZS, 280 employees.
Challenge: The tax inspectorate initiated a field audit with a preliminary estimate of additional assessments of 4.2 bn UZS in VAT, profit tax and social tax. Main claims — economic substantiation of marketing costs and transfer pricing operations with an affiliated importer.
Approach:
1. Prepared substantiation files for each of 23 disputed transactions with supporting documents and market price calculations.
2. Applied the comparable uncontrolled price (CUP) method to transfer transactions, proving 90% of deals comply with Article 176 of the Uzbek Tax Code.
3. Prepared a memorandum on the economic substantiation of marketing costs linked to revenue growth.
4. Supported all 14 working meetings with inspectors, achieving partial withdrawal of the initial assessment.
Outcome: Initially claimed: 4.2 bn UZS; Final assessments: 180 mln UZS; Reduction: −95.7%; Penalties: 0 (all dropped).
Additional assessments reduced from 4.2 bn to 180 mln UZS — through correct positioning, with no appeals or court proceedings. The client preserved working capital and reputation.

#### Banking: Statutory Audit (10 weeks)
Client profile: Second-tier commercial bank, assets 2.1 trillion UZS, loan portfolio 1.3 trillion UZS, 45 branches, 720 employees.
Challenge: Annual statutory audit under ISA with in-depth review of the loan portfolio, loan loss provisions, and compliance with Central Bank of Uzbekistan prudential requirements.
Approach:
1. Applied a sample testing method to the loan portfolio: 142 loans out of 8,200, total sample size 38% of the portfolio.
2. Conducted independent collateral valuation for 56 large loans engaging certified appraisers.
3. Tested the bank's IFRS 9 ECL model, verified the migration matrix and forward-looking scenarios.
4. Agreed 11 adjustments with the bank prior to issuing the opinion, saving the bank a separate disclosure in the annual report.
Outcome: Sample coverage: 38% of portfolio; LLP adjustments: +47 bn UZS; Opinion type: Unqualified; CBU compliance: 100%.
Opinion issued before the reporting deadline to the CBU. The bank passed the Central Bank's review without comments — thanks to preventive adjustments agreed during the audit.

#### Healthcare: Bookkeeping Restoration (7 weeks)
Client profile: Importer and distributor of pharmaceutical products, 6 regional warehouses, annual turnover 31 bn UZS.
Challenge: After the chief accountant resigned, primary documents for 14 months were missing, inventory discrepancies of 2.8 bn UZS, tax reporting not filed for 4 quarters. Time until scheduled tax inspection — 2 months.
Approach:
1. Restored primary documents through requests to counterparties and the e-faktura system — 8,400 invoices and 2,100 waybills.
2. Performed a complete inventory of 6 warehouses with photo documentation, identified actual discrepancies of 940 mln UZS (vs the preliminary 2.8 bn estimate).
3. Prepared and filed correcting declarations for VAT, profit tax and social tax for the 4 missed periods.
4. Implemented a daily reconciliation regulation between warehouse balances and accounting records.
Outcome: Documents restored: 10,500 items; Actual shortage: 940 mln UZS; STC penalties: 0 (voluntary filing); Duration: 7 weeks.
We finished before the tax inspection arrived. All missing declarations filed, taxes paid voluntarily — exempting the company from penalties under Article 219 of the Tax Code.

#### M&A: Due Diligence (5.5 weeks)
Client profile: Buyer — foreign investment fund. Target — manufacturing company in Uzbekistan with 110 bn UZS turnover and 450 employees. Deal size — discussed at $12 M.
Challenge: Financial and tax due diligence before business acquisition. Time constraint — 6 weeks including holidays. Hidden risks not reflected in the seller's management reporting.
Approach:
1. Financial DD: revenue quality check (by counterparty, currency, seasonality), EBITDA normalization excluding one-time items.
2. Tax DD: assessment of risks in VAT, profit tax, transfer pricing, dispute liabilities.
3. Legal DD (with partner counsel): asset encumbrances, corporate rights, licenses and permits.
4. Prepared an 84-page DD report with a separate quality of earnings (QoE) section and a quantified risk register.
Outcome: Hidden risks identified: $2.1 M; Deal price adjustment: −$1.4 M; Project duration: 5.5 weeks; Deal: Closed.
Hidden tax and legal risks of $2.1 M became grounds for revising the deal price. The buyer saved $1.4 M and placed the remainder in escrow for 24 months.


---

# Leader Audit — Oʻzbekcha

## Услуги / Services

### Majburiy audit
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/services/obligatory-audit

O'zbekiston Moliya vazirligi litsenziyasi · 13 yil tajriba · 220+ tekshiruv

#### Majburiy audit nima
Majburiy audit — bu O'zbekiston Respublikasi qonunchiligi talab qiladigan kompaniyaning moliyaviy hisobotini mustaqil tekshirish. U yiliga bir marta litsenziyalangan auditorlik tashkiloti tomonidan o'tkaziladi va davlat organlariga taqdim etiladigan hamda belgilangan hollarda e'lon qilinadigan rasmiy auditorlik xulosasi bilan yakunlanadi.
O'zbekistonda majburiy audit «Auditorlik faoliyati to'g'risida»gi Qonun bilan tartibga solinadi va keng doiradagi sub'ektlar uchun majburiydir: aksiyadorlik jamiyatlari, banklar, sug'urta kompaniyalari, fondlar, birjalar va yirik korxonalar. Majburiy audit talablarini bajarmaslik jarima va soliq organlarida hisobot bloklashga olib keladi.
Leader Audit O'zbekiston Respublikasi Moliya vazirligining auditorlik faoliyatini amalga oshirish bo'yicha litsenziyasiga, professional javobgarlik sug'urta polisiga va turli sohalarda majburiy auditni o'tkazish bo'yicha 13 yildan ortiq tajribaga ega.

#### Kimga majburiy audit kerak
- Aksiyadorlik jamiyatlari (AJ), shu jumladan ochiq va yopiq
- Banklar va kredit tashkilotlari
- Sug'urta va qayta sug'urta kompaniyalari
- Investitsiya va pensiya fondlari
- Birjalar va qimmatli qog'ozlar bozorining professional ishtirokchilari
- Davlat korxonalari va davlat ulushi 50% dan ortiq korxonalar
- Tushum/aktivlar/xodimlar bo'yicha belgilangan chegaralardan oshgan yirik kompaniyalar
- MHXS bo'yicha audit majburiyatiga ega xorijiy kompaniyalar va QK

#### Nimaga ega bo'lasiz
- **Auditorlik xulosasi** — Moliyaviy hisobotning ishonchliligini tasdiqlovchi va O'zbekiston davlat organlari tomonidan qabul qilinadigan rasmiy hujjat.
- **Soliq xavflari** — Soliq tomonidan e'tirozga uchrashi mumkin bo'lgan narsalarning va ularning pul ko'rinishidagi qiymatining to'liq xarita ko'rinishi.
- **Hisob bo'yicha tavsiyalar** — Aniqlangan kamchiliklar asosida buxgalteriya va soliq hisobini yaxshilash bo'yicha amaliy tavsiyalar.
- **Jarimadan himoya** — O'z vaqtida o'tkazilgan audit hisobot taqdim etmaganlik uchun jarimalardan va hisoblarning bloklashidan himoya qiladi.
- **Tekshiruvga tayyorlik** — Bizning auditdan keyin siz har qanday soliq yoki moliyaviy tekshiruvga tayyorsiz.
- **Investorlar ishonchi** — Litsenziyalangan kompaniyaning auditorlik xulosasi — investitsiya va kreditlarni jalb qilish uchun majburiy shart.

#### Majburiy audit qanday o'tadi
1. **Bepul konsultatsiya** — Kompaniya bilan tanishish, ish hajmini aniqlash, narx va muddatni hisoblash. 1-2 ish kuni.
2. **Shartnoma va audit rejasi** — Shartnoma, tekshiruvning reja-grafikasi, talab qilinadigan hujjatlar ro'yxati. 2-3 kun.
3. **Hujjatlarni yig'ish va tahlil** — Hisob registrlari, dastlabki hujjatlar, hisobotni olish. Masofadan kirish yoki mijoz ofisida ishlash. 1-2 hafta.
4. **Audit protseduralari** — Muhim operatsiyalarni tekshirish, ichki nazoratni testlash, soliq yuki va xavflarini tahlil qilish. 2-4 hafta.
5. **Mijoz bilan natijalarni muhokama qilish** — Dastlabki natijalarni taqdim etish, bahsli savollarni muhokama qilish, hisobdagi tuzatishlar. 3-5 kun.
6. **Xulosa va hisobotni topshirish** — Rasmiy auditorlik xulosasi, xavflar bo'yicha batafsil hisobot, tavsiyalar. 1-2 kun.

#### Nega Leader Audit
- O'zbekiston Respublikasi Moliya vazirligi litsenziyasi
- Professional javobgarlik sug'urtasi — zararni qoplash kafolati
- 13 yil tajriba va 220+ o'tkazilgan auditorlik tekshiruvi
- Yetakchi mutaxassislarda CAP, CIPA, DipIFR (ACCA) xalqaro sertifikatlari
- XAS (ISA) xalqaro standartlari bo'yicha ish
- Medical, IT, Manufacturing va boshqa murakkab sohalarda chuqur tajriba
- To'liq maxfiylik — boshlanishida oshkor qilmaslik shartnomasi
- Shaffof narxlash — shartnomada qat'iy narx, yashirin to'lovlar yo'q

#### Majburiy audit narxi
Narx individual shakllanadi va quyidagilarga bog'liq: kompaniya faoliyati hajmi, hisobot turi (MHXS yoki XHXS), soha, operatsiyalar soni, filiallar va sho'ba kompaniyalar mavjudligi. Yakuniy narx ekspress tahlildan keyin shartnomada qat'iylashtiriladi. Birinchi konsultatsiya bepul.

#### Majburiy audit haqida tez-tez beriladigan savollar
**2025 yil uchun majburiy auditni qaysi muddatlarda o'tkazish kerak?**
Moliyaviy hisobotning majburiy auditi yillik hisobotni topshirishdan oldin — odatda hisobot yilidan keyingi yilning aprel oxirigacha o'tkazilishi kerak. Yanvar-fevraldan boshlash tavsiya etiladi, shunda kamchiliklarni bartaraf etish uchun vaqt qoladi.

**Majburiy auditni o'z vaqtida o'tkazmaslik nima oqibatlarga olib keladi?**
Auditorlik xulosasini taqdim etmaganlik uchun KoAO RUz bo'yicha jarimalar, shuningdek yillik hisobotni topshira olmaslik va operatsiyalarning bloklanishi nazarda tutilgan. Ayrim hollarda litsenziyani yo'qotish ham mumkin (banklar, sug'urta, investitsiya kompaniyalari uchun).

**Majburiy auditni tashabbuskor audit bilan almashtirish mumkinmi?**
Yo'q. Majburiy audit — qonun talabi va tashabbuskor audit uni almashtirmaydi. Tashabbuskor audit qo'shimcha o'tkazilishi mumkin — masalan, biznesni sotishga yoki investorlarni jalb qilishga tayyorgarlik uchun.

**O'rtacha kompaniya uchun majburiy audit qancha turadi?**
Narx ko'plab omillarga bog'liq va individual shakllanadi. Hisoblash uchun so'rov qoldiring yoki +998 97 410 04 47 ga qo'ng'iroq qiling — 1-2 ish kuni ichida tijorat taklifi tayyorlaymiz.

**Auditni masofadan o'tkazish mumkinmi?**
Ha, biz ham masofadan (himoyalangan hujjat almashish kanallari orqali), ham mijoz ofisida ishlaymiz. Ko'pgina protseduralar masofadan amalga oshirilishi mumkin.

**Majburiy audit narxiga nima kiradi?**
Audit protseduralarining to'liq tsikli, auditorlik xulosasi, xavflar va tavsiyalar bo'yicha batafsil hisobot, zarurat tug'ilganda xulosani soliq organlari oldida himoya qilish. Qo'shimcha xizmatlar (hisobni tiklash, konsultatsiya) — alohida kelishuv bo'yicha.

### Tashabbuskor audit
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/services/initiative-audit

Moliyaviy holatning ixtiyoriy tekshiruvi — egalar, investorlar va rahbarlar uchun

#### Tashabbuskor audit nima
Tashabbuskor audit — egalar yoki rahbariyat qaroriga binoan o'tkaziladigan kompaniyaning moliyaviy hisobotining ixtiyoriy mustaqil tekshiruvi. Majburiy auditdan farqli ravishda u qonun talablari bilan tartibga solinmaydi va biznesning aniq vazifalariga moslashtiriladi.
Tashabbuskor auditning asosiy maqsadlari: soliq topishidan oldin moliyaviy va soliq xavflarini aniqlash, kompaniya sotib olish/sotishda hisobning ishonchliligini baholash, investitsiya yoki kreditlarni jalb qilishga hisobotni tayyorlash, ichki buxgalteriya ishini tekshirish, suiiste'mollik va o'g'irlikni aniqlash.
Leader Audit tashabbuskor auditni ham to'liq (kompleks) audit, ham tematik — masalan, faqat soliqlar auditi yoki faqat ma'lum faoliyat yo'nalishining auditi sifatida o'tkazadi. Ish hajmi har doim mijoz bilan kelishiladi.

#### Tashabbuskor audit qachon kerak
- Biznesni sotishdan oldin — moliyaviy shaffoflikni tasdiqlash uchun
- Investorlarni jalb qilish yoki bank krediti olishdan oldin
- Soliq tekshiruvidan oldin — barcha xavflarni oldindan topish va bartaraf etish
- Egasi yoki bosh direktor o'zgarganda — ishlarni qabul qilish
- Bosh buxgalter yoki ichki buxgalteriya ishida shubha bo'lganda
- Xalqaro bozorlarga chiqishga tayyorgarlik ko'rishda
- Bosh kompaniya yoki xorijiy investorning iltimosi bo'yicha
- Yirik moliyaviy nosozlik yoki firibgarlikka shubha bo'lgandan keyin

#### Tashabbuskor auditdan nimaga ega bo'lasiz
- **Soliq xavflari xaritasi** — Soliqlar bo'yicha barcha xavflar ro'yxati — ehtimollik va mumkin bo'lgan qo'shimcha hisob-kitob summasi bilan.
- **Moliyaviy shaffoflik** — Hisobotning ishonchliligini tasdiqlash — investorlar va biznes xaridorlari uchun muhim.
- **Suiiste'molliklarni aniqlash** — O'g'irlik belgilarini, soxta operatsiyalarni, hisob bilan manipulyatsiyalarni qidirish.
- **Optimallashtirish bo'yicha tavsiyalar** — Qonun doirasida soliq yukini kamaytirish bo'yicha aniq takliflar.
- **Tekshiruvga tayyorlik** — Soliq inspeksiyasi kelishidan oldin barcha kuchsiz joylar bartaraf etilgan.
- **Qaror qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Strategik boshqaruv qarorlarini qabul qilish uchun ob'ektiv manzara.

#### Tashabbuskor audit qanday o'tadi
1. **Maqsadlarni muhokama qilish** — Egasi yoki rahbar vazifalarni shakllantiradi: aynan nimani va nima uchun tekshirish kerak. 1 uchrashuv.
2. **Dasturni moslashtirish** — Aniq maqsadlar uchun individual audit dasturini tuzamiz — keraksiz protseduralarsiz. 2-3 kun.
3. **Dala ishi** — Hisobni tahlil qilish, operatsiyalarni testlash, asosiy xodimlar bilan suhbat. 1-3 hafta.
4. **Oraliq xulosalar** — Topilmalarni mijoz bilan muhokama qilish, zarur bo'lganda fokusni o'zgartirish. Ish davomida.
5. **Yakuniy hisobot** — Xavflar, ularning pul ko'rinishidagi baholanishi, tavsiyalar va prioritetlar bilan to'liq hisobot. 3-5 kun.

#### Nega Leader Audit tashabbuskor audit uchun
- Eng turli sohalarda 220+ audit tajribasi
- To'liq maxfiylik — faqat mijoz va uning ishonchli shaxslari biladi
- Moslashuvchan audit dasturi — aynan kerak bo'lganini tekshiramiz
- Soliq auditi va soliq xavflarini baholashda chuqur tajriba
- Mijozning ichki buxgalteriyasidan mustaqillik — ob'ektiv baho
- M&A bitimlari va investorlarni jalb qilish uchun due diligence tajribasi

#### Tashabbuskor audit narxi
Narx tekshiruv hajmi, tanlangan chuqurlik (to'liq yoki tematik audit), soha va davrga bog'liq. Shoshilinch vazifalar uchun ekspress audit formati (5-7 kunda) mavjud. Birinchi konsultatsiya bepul.

#### Tashabbuskor audit haqida tez-tez beriladigan savollar
**Tashabbuskor audit majburiy auditdan qanday farq qiladi?**
Majburiy audit qonun bilan talab qilinadi — AJ, banklar, yirik kompaniyalar uchun — va hajmi bo'yicha qat'iy standartlar bilan tartibga solinadi. Tashabbuskor audit ixtiyoriy o'tkaziladi va mijozning aniq maqsadlariga moslashtiriladi.

**Tashabbuskor audit natijasini soliq uchun ishlatish mumkinmi?**
Tashabbuskor audit bo'yicha auditorlik xulosasi soliq oldida majburiy audit xulosasi kabi rasmiy maqomga ega emas, lekin amaliy ravishda topilgan xavflar va tavsiyalar tekshiruvdan oldin xatolarni tuzatish va qo'shimcha hisob-kitob xavfini kamaytirishga imkon beradi.

**Tashabbuskor audit qancha turadi va uni tezda qilish mumkinmi?**
Narx ish hajmiga bog'liq. Shoshilinch vazifalar uchun ekspress audit formati (5-7 kun) — masalan, M&A bitimidan oldin. To'liq tashabbuskor audit 3-6 hafta davom etadi.

**Audit natijalarini soliq organlari biladimi?**
Yo'q. Tashabbuskor audit natijalari mijozning maxfiy ma'lumotidir. Loyiha boshlanishida NDA imzolaymiz va ma'lumotlarni uchinchi shaxslarga uzatmaymiz.

**Tashabbuskor auditni faqat soliqlar bo'yicha o'tkazish mumkinmi?**
Ha, bu juda mashhur format. Tematik soliq auditi aynan soliq hisob-kitoblari va deklaratsiyalarni tekshiradi — QQS, foyda solig'i, YIS, aktsizlar, aylanma solig'i. To'liq auditdan arzonroq turadi va kamroq vaqt oladi.

### Soliq konsalting
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/services/tax-consulting

Soliq yukini va xavflarini kamaytiring — qonuniy va strategik

#### Soliq konsalting nima
Soliq konsalting — biznesning soliq majburiyatlarini boshqarishda professional yordam: qonunchilik bo'yicha joriy maslahatdan to soliq yukini strategik optimallashtirishgacha.
O'zbekistonda soliq qonunchiligi faol o'zgarib turadi: yangi imtiyozlar, stavkalar o'zgarishi, hisob va hisobot talablarining qattiqlashishi. Dolzarb ekspertizasiz kompaniya ko'proq to'laydi yoki, aksincha, soliqlarni kamaytirishning qonuniy usullarini o'tkazib yuboradi.
Leader Audit soliq konsaltingning to'liq spektrini taqdim etadi — bir martalik konsultatsiyalardan to biznesning strategik qarorlarida ishtirok etish bilan doimiy hamrohlikgacha. Ekspertizamiz Moliya vazirligi litsenziyasi va 220+ soliq audit tajribasi bilan tasdiqlanadi.

#### Soliq konsalting qachon kerak
- Yangi yo'nalish yoki mahsulotni ishga tushirishdan oldin
- Xalqaro bozorlarga chiqish yoki xorijiy kontragentlar bilan ishlashda
- Soliq organlaridan ogohlantirish yoki chaqiriqlar olganda
- Yirik bitimlarni rejalashtirishda (M&A, aktivlar sotib olish, qayta tashkil etish)
- Import/eksportda — QQS va bojxona to'lovlarini optimallashtirish
- Bog'liq tomonlar bilan ishlashda (transfer narxlash)
- Soliq tekshiruviga tayyorgarlik ko'rishda
- Soliq inspeksiyasi bilan bahsli vaziyatlarda

#### Soliq konsalting nimani o'z ichiga oladi
- **Soliq maslahati** — Soliqqa tortish bo'yicha aniq savollarga qonunchilikka havolalar bilan yozma asosli javoblar.
- **Soliq optimallashtirish** — Imtiyozlar, maxsus rejimlar, xalqaro shartnomalar orqali soliq yukini kamaytirishning qonuniy usullarini izlash.
- **Xalqaro soliqqa tortish** — Xorijiy kontragentlar bilan operatsiyalarni tuzilmalashtirish, qo'sh soliqqa tortishdan qochish to'g'risidagi shartnomalarni qo'llash.
- **Transfer narxlash** — TN bo'yicha hujjatlarni tayyorlash, soliq oldida himoya, bog'liq tomonlar bilan bitimlarda bozor narxlarini asoslash.
- **Soliq tekshiruvlarini qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Tekshiruvga tayyorgarlik, so'rovlarga javoblar, kompaniya pozitsiyasini himoya qilish, hujjatlarni shikoyat qilishda yordam.
- **QQSni qaytarish** — RUz byudjetidan kiruvchi QQSni qaytarish protsedurasini to'liq qo'llab-quvvatlash.
- **Biznes ochish** — Yuridik shaxslarni ro'yxatdan o'tkazish, optimal shakl va soliq rejimini tanlash, soliq organlarida ro'yxatga olish.

#### Biz qanday ishlaymiz
1. **Mijoz so'rovi** — Vazifani tasvirlang — aniq savol, vaziyat, loyiha. Iloji boricha hujjatlar bilan birga.
2. **Vaziyat tahlili** — Kontekst, qonunchilik, sud amaliyoti, GNK va Moliya vazirligining tushuntirishlarini o'rganamiz.
3. **Yozma maslahat** — Asoslash, normativ aktlarga havolalar va tavsiyalar bilan yozma javob tayyorlaymiz.
4. **Joriy etish va qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Zarurat tug'ilganda yechimni joriy etishda yordam beramiz va paydo bo'ladigan savollarga javob beramiz.

#### Nega Leader Audit soliq konsalting uchun
- Litsenziyalangan auditorlik tashkiloti — soliqlarni ichdan chuqur tushunish
- Mijozlarga 200 mlrd so'mdan ortiq QQSni qaytarishda yordam
- Soliq tekshiruvlari va sud bahslarini qo'llab-quvvatlash tajribasi
- Xalqaro soliqqa tortish va O'zbekiston shartnomalarini bilish
- Asoslangan yozma maslahatlar — soliq bilan bahslarda ishlatish mumkin
- Maxfiylik va mustaqillik — biz mijoz manfaatlarida ishlaymiz

#### Soliq konsalting narxi
Mumkin formatlar: bir martalik konsultatsiya (aniq savol uchun qat'iy narx), abonement (qat'iy oylik to'lov bilan doimiy hamrohlik), loyiha hamrohligi (masalan, M&A bitimi yoki tekshiruvga tayyorlanish). Narx individual hisoblanadi.

#### Soliq konsalting bo'yicha tez-tez beriladigan savollar
**Soliq optimallashtirish nima va u soliqdan qochish emasmi?**
Soliq optimallashtirish — bu imtiyozlar, maxsus rejimlar, operatsiyalarni qayta qurish orqali soliq yukini qonuniy kamaytirish. Soliqdan qochish — qonunbuzarlik. Leader Audit faqat amaldagi qonunchilik doirasida ishlaydi.

**O'zbekistonda xalqaro soliqqa tortish qanday ishlaydi?**
O'zbekiston 50 dan ortiq mamlakat bilan qo'sh soliqqa tortishdan qochish to'g'risidagi shartnomalarga ega. Biz bu shartnomalarni to'g'ri qo'llashda, rezidentlik tasdiqlarini rasmiylashtirishda, chet elga to'lovlarda manba bo'yicha soliqni hisoblashda yordam beramiz.

**Transfer narxlash bo'yicha hujjatlarni qachon tayyorlash majburiy?**
RUz Soliq kodeksiga ko'ra, TN bo'yicha hujjatlar belgilangan chegaralardan oshganda nazorat qilinadigan bitimlar uchun majburiy. TN tayyorlash tekshiruv natijalari bo'yicha qo'shimcha hisob-kitobdan himoya qiladi.

**Soliq tekshiruvini qo'llab-quvvatlash qancha turadi?**
Narx tekshiruv hajmi va vaziyat murakkabligiga bog'liq. Butun loyiha uchun qat'iy narx yoki soatlik to'lov mumkin. Boshlang'ichida bepul diagnostika o'tkazamiz.

**Siz soliq tekshiruvi aktlarini bekor qila olasizmi?**
Ha, biz aktlarga e'tirozlar tuzishda, yuqori turuvchi soliq organiga shikoyatlar tayyorlashda yordam beramiz va professional ekspertiza qismida soliq organlari bilan sud bahslarini qo'llab-quvvatlaymiz.

### QQS qaytarish
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/services/vat-refund

Mijozlarga RUz byudjetidan 200 mlrd so'mdan ortiq QQSni qaytarishda yordam berdik

#### O'zbekistonda QQSni qaytarish — bilish kerak bo'lgan narsalar
QQSni qaytarish — kompaniyaning hisob raqamiga kiruvchi QQS (yetkazib beruvchilarga to'langan) chiquvchi QQSdan (xaridorlardan olingan) ortiqchasini qaytarish protsedurasi. O'zbekistonda QQSni qaytarish uchta asosiy holatda mumkin: tovar va xizmatlar eksportida, investitsion faoliyatda, oddiy faoliyat doirasida kiruvchi QQS chiquvchidan oshganida.
Soliq kodeksi qaytarish huquqini kafolatlashiga qaramay, amaliyotda protsedura soliq organlarining kameral tekshiruvi bilan birga keladi. Arizalarning taxminan 30% i hujjatlardagi texnik xatolar tufayli rad etiladi yoki qayta ishlash uchun qaytariladi. Har bir xato — yo'qolgan vaqt va pul.
Leader Audit 2013 yildan beri QQSni qaytarishga ixtisoslashgan. Mijozlarga 200 mlrd so'mdan ortiq qaytarishda yordam berdik va protseduraning barcha nuanslarini bilamiz — to'g'ri schyot-fakturalarni tayyorlashdan to kameral tekshiruvda pozitsiyani himoya qilishgacha.

#### Kim QQSni qaytara oladi
- Tovar va xizmatlar eksportchilari (0% QQS stavkasi bilan)
- Investorlar — investitsion loyihalarni amalga oshirish uchun jihozlar va materiallarni olib kirishda
- Faoliyat boshida bo'lgan kompaniyalar — investitsiya va xaridlar tushumdan ko'p bo'lganda
- Yetkazib beruvchilar va bojxonadan katta hajmdagi kiruvchi QQS bilan importchilar
- Uzoq ishlab chiqarish tsikli bo'lgan ishlab chiqaruvchilar
- Investitsion bosqichdagi qurilish va infratuzilma kompaniyalari
- Norezidentlarga xizmat ko'rsatuvchi IT-kompaniyalar
- Yirik kapital qo'yilmalardan keyin kompaniyalar

#### QQSni qaytarishda nima qilamiz
- **Hujjatlar auditi** — Schyot-fakturalar, shartnomalar, aktlar, GTDni qaytarish talablariga muvofiqligini tekshiramiz. Ariza topshirish OLDIN xavflarni aniqlaymiz.
- **Ariza tayyorlash** — GNK talablariga muvofiq ariza va hujjatlar to'plamini tayyorlaymiz. Rad etish ehtimolini minimallashtiramiz.
- **Soliq organiga topshirish** — Hujjatlarni soliq to'lovchining shaxsiy kabineti orqali topshiramiz, arizani ro'yxatdan o'tkazishni nazorat qilamiz.
- **Tekshiruvni qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Soliq inspektorining so'rovlariga javob beramiz, kompaniya pozitsiyasini himoya qilamiz, qo'shimcha hujjatlar bilan yordam beramiz.
- **Rad etishdan himoya** — Rad etish yoki qisman qaytarishda e'tirozlar, yuqori organda shikoyat va zarur bo'lganda — sud da'vosini tayyorlaymiz.
- **Kelib tushishni nazorat** — Qaytarishning hisob raqamiga kelib tushishini nazorat qilamiz, texnik kechikishlarda blokirovkani ochishda yordam beramiz.

#### Qaytarish protsedurasi qanday o'tadi
1. **Audit va tayyorlash** — Davr uchun hujjatlarni tahlil qilish, xatolarni aniqlash va bartaraf etish, qaytariladigan summani hisoblash. 1-2 hafta.
2. **Ariza topshirish** — Hujjatlar to'plamini shakllantirish, GNKga shaxsiy kabinet orqali topshirish. 1-2 kun.
3. **Kameral tekshiruv** — Soliq qaytarishning qonuniyligini tekshiradi. Qonun bo'yicha — 60 kungacha. Barcha so'rovlarni qo'llab-quvvatlaymiz. 30-60 kun.
4. **Qaror va qaytarish** — GNK qaytarish to'g'risida qaror qabul qiladi (to'liq / qisman / rad etish). Ijobiy qarorda mablag'lar hisob raqamiga keladi. 10 kungacha.

#### Nega aynan biz QQSni qaytarish uchun
- Mijozlarga 200+ mlrd so'm QQSni qaytarishda yordam berdik
- Protseduraning barcha nuanslari va suv osti toshlarini bilamiz — ularni oldindan hisobga olamiz
- Barcha bosqichlarda qo'llab-quvvatlash — hujjatlardan to hisobga kelib tushishigacha
- Bahsli vaziyatlarda himoya qilish, shu jumladan sudda tajriba
- Qaytarish summasidan foiz bo'yicha ishlash mumkin — to'lov faqat ijobiy natija bilan
- Maxfiylik va tezkor aloqa — soliq so'rovlariga olingan kuni javob beramiz

#### QQSni qaytarish xizmatlari narxi
Ikki format mumkin: qat'iy narx (barcha bosqichlarni o'z ichiga oladi) yoki haqiqatan qaytarilgan summadan foiz (faqat muvaffaqiyatda to'lov). Aniq sxema qaytarish hajmiga va keys murakkabligiga qarab kelishiladi.

#### QQSni qaytarish haqida tez-tez beriladigan savollar
**O'zbekistonda QQSni qaytarish qancha vaqt oladi?**
Kameral tekshiruv qonun bo'yicha ariza topshirilganidan boshlab 60 kungacha davom etadi. Ijobiy qarordan keyin mablag'lar hisob raqamiga 10 ish kuni ichida keladi. Jami — topshirishdan pulni olishgacha 2-3 oy.

**Qaytarish uchun minimal QQS hajmi qancha?**
Qonun bo'yicha minimum belgilanmagan — nazariy jihatdan har qanday summani qaytarish uchun ariza berish mumkin. Amaliyotda, jarayon samaradorligi uchun, 50 mln so'mdan boshlab arizani topshirishni tavsiya qilamiz.

**Eksportchilarga QQSni qaytarish uchun nima kerak?**
Norezident-xaridor bilan shartnoma, eksport operatsiyalari uchun schyot-fakturalar (0% QQS stavkasi bilan), jo'natish hujjatlari (GTD, CMR/konosament), valuta tushishi to'g'risida bank ko'chirmalari, yetkazib beruvchilardan kiruvchi QQS hujjatlari.

**Deklaratsiya allaqachon topshirilgan bo'lsa, QQSni qaytarish mumkinmi?**
Ha. Qaytarish to'g'risidagi ariza deklaratsiyadan alohida topshiriladi, odatda u topshirilgandan keyin. Da'vo muddati — QQS ortiqcha to'lovi paydo bo'lgan paytdan boshlab 3 yil.

**Qaytarishda rad etilganda nima qilish kerak?**
Avval tekshiruv aktidagi rad etish sabablarini tahlil qilamiz. E'tirozlar, zarurat tug'ilganda — yuqori turuvchi soliq organiga apellyatsiya, keyingi rad etishda — sudga da'vo tayyorlaymiz.

### Buxgalteriya autsorsing
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/services/accounting

Buxgalteriyani professionallar tomonidan to'liq yuritish — shtatlilarsiz

#### Buxgalteriya autsorsingi nima
Buxgalteriya autsorsingi — buxgalteriya va soliq hisobi funksiyalarini tashqi professional kompaniyaga topshirish. Shtatdagi bosh buxgalter va jamoani yollash o'rniga siz qat'iy oylik narx bilan xalqaro sertifikatlangan ekspertlar jamoasini olasiz.
O'zbekistonda buxgalteriya autsorsingi tobora ko'proq talab qilinmoqda — ayniqsa kichik va o'rta biznes, xorijiy vakolatxonalar, IT-kompaniyalar va startaplar uchun. Asosiy afzalliklari: ish haqi va infratuzilmadan tejash, bir kishining xatolariga oid xavflarning yo'qligi, o'zgaruvchan qonunchilik bo'yicha doimiy dolzarb ekspertiza.
Leader Audit buxgalteriya xizmatlarining to'liq spektrini taqdim etadi — kichik kompaniya hisobini yuritishdan to filiallar va sho'ba tuzilmalarga ega yirik holdinglarni qo'llab-quvvatlashgacha. Biz MHXS va XHXS bo'yicha ishlaymiz, hisobotni transformatsiya qilamiz, ish haqi va kadr hisobini olib boramiz.

#### Buxgalteriya autsorsingi kimga mos
- Kichik va o'rta biznesga — shtatdagi buxgalterdan arzonroq
- Startaplar va IT-kompaniyalarga — yollash xarajatisiz birinchi kundan ekspertiza
- Xorijiy kompaniyalar va vakolatxonalarga — mahalliy qonunchilikni bilish
- Mavsumiy faoliyatdagi kompaniyalarga — ish hajmi bo'yicha to'lov
- Bosh buxgalter ishdan ketganlarga — ishlarni tezda qabul qilish va davom ettirish
- Soliq muammolaridan keyingi kompaniyalarga — hisobni tiklash va jarayonlarni yo'lga qo'yish
- Bir nechta yuridik shaxslarga ega holdinglarga — yagona hisob standarti
- Xalqaro faoliyatga ega biznesga — XHXS bo'yicha parallel hisob

#### Buxgalteriya autsorsingi nimani o'z ichiga oladi
- **Hisob yuritish** — MHXS bo'yicha buxgalteriya va soliq hisobini to'liq yuritish — barcha dastlabki hujjatlar, provodkalar, registrlar.
- **Hisobni tiklash** — Ma'lumotlar yo'qotilganidan, bosh buxgalter ishdan ketganidan yoki oldingi jamoaning xatolaridan keyin hisobni tiklaymiz.
- **Hisobot** — Barcha majburiy hisobotni tayyorlash va topshirish — soliq, statistik, moliyaviy — belgilangan muddatlarda.
- **XHXSga transformatsiya** — MHXS bilan parallel xalqaro standartlar bo'yicha hisobotni tayyorlash — xorijiy investorlar va bosh kompaniyalar uchun.
- **Ish haqi va soliqlarni hisoblash** — Barcha xodimlarning ish haqi, ta'til, kasallik, ushlab qolish, soliqlar va to'lovlarini hisoblash.
- **Kadr hisobi** — Mehnat daftarchalari, buyruqlar, tabellar, kadr hujjatlarini RUz mehnat qonunchiligiga muvofiq yuritish.
- **Elektron hujjat aylanishi** — EHA ni sozlash va yuritish — schyot-fakturalar, aktlar, shartnomalar elektron shaklda.
- **Soliq konsultatsiyalari** — Soliq masalalari bo'yicha doimiy yordam — abonentlar uchun qo'shimcha to'lovsiz.

#### Mijozni autsorsingga qanday o'tkazamiz
1. **Tanishish va joriy hisob auditi** — Buxgalteriyaning joriy holatini tahlil qilamiz, muammolarni aniqlaymiz va ish hajmini baholaymiz. 3-5 kun.
2. **Shartnoma va o'tish rejasi** — Shartnoma, NDA imzolaymiz, reglamentni kelishamiz, ishlarni topshirishni rejalashtiramiz. 2-3 kun.
3. **Ishlarni topshirish** — Hisob tizimi, ma'lumotlar bazasi, hujjatlarga kirish olamiz. Yetishmayotgan narsani tiklaymiz. 1-2 hafta.
4. **Yuritishni boshlash** — Hisobni ishimizga olamiz, muntazam hisobotni shakllantiramiz, aloqa o'rnatamiz.
5. **Doimiy qo'llab-quvvatlash** — Oylik yuritish, hisobot, savollarga javoblar, soliq qo'llab-quvvatlash.

#### Nega Leader Audit buxgalteriya autsorsingi uchun
- O'zbekiston buxgalteriya va soliq hisobida 13 yillik tajriba
- CAP, CIPA, DipIFR xalqaro sertifikatlariga ega jamoa
- Moliya vazirligi litsenziyasi — professionallik kafolati
- Javobgarlik sug'urtasi — xatolarda kompensatsiya
- XHXS bo'yicha parallel hisob — xorijiy investorlar uchun
- Bitta aloqa menejeri — byurokratiyasiz va o'tishlarsiz
- Shartnomada shaffof narx — yashirin qo'shimcha to'lovlarsiz
- Maxfiylik — har bir mijoz bilan NDA

#### Buxgalteriya autsorsingi narxi
Narx oyiga operatsiyalar soni, kompaniya hajmi, xodimlar soni, hisob murakkabligi va qo'shimcha vazifalar mavjudligiga (XHXS, kadr hisobi, ish haqi) bog'liq. Qat'iy abonement yoki soatlik to'lov mumkin. Hisoblash — hisob holatining qisqa auditidan keyin.

#### Buxgalteriya autsorsingi haqida tez-tez beriladigan savollar
**Autsorsing shtatdagi buxgalteriyadan qimmatroq yoki arzonroqmi?**
Kichik va o'rta biznes uchun autsorsing deyarli har doim arzon: siz haqiqiy ish hajmi uchun to'laysiz, shtatdagi buxgalter ish haqi + soliqlar + ish joyi + dasturiy ta'minot + ishdan bo'shatish xavfi uchun emas. Operatsiyalar hajmi katta bo'lgan juda yirik kompaniyalar uchun ba'zan o'z xizmatiga ega bo'lish foydaliroq.

**Hisobdagi xatolar uchun kim javobgar?**
Leader Audit xizmatlar sifati uchun to'liq professional javobgarlikni o'z zimmasiga oladi va bu sug'urta polisi bilan tasdiqlanadi. Xatoda jarima va penyalarni o'z hisobimizdan qoplaymiz.

**XHXS bo'yicha parallel hisob yuritish mumkinmi?**
Ha, biz xorijiy investorlar yoki bosh kompaniyalarga ega kompaniyalar uchun XHXS bo'yicha parallel hisobni muntazam qilamiz. Davrlar uchun MHXSdan XHXSga hisobotni transformatsiya ham qilamiz.

**Buxgalteriyani tashqi kompaniyaga topshirish xavfsizmi?**
Biz har bir mijoz bilan NDA imzolaymiz, himoyalangan aloqa kanallari bilan ishlaymiz, ma'lumotlarga kirishni faqat loyiha mutaxassislari bilan cheklaymiz. 13 yillik ish davomida — birorta ham ma'lumot tashqariga chiqishi holati bo'lmagan.

**Hozir buxgalteriyamda to'liq tartibsizlik bo'lsa nima qilamiz?**
Bu autsorsingga o'tishda eng tez-tez uchraydigan vaziyat. Biz hisobni tiklaymiz — bazani qayta yaratamiz, yetishmayotgan hujjatlarni tiklaymiz, o'tgan davrlardagi xatolarni tuzatamiz, undan keyin doimiy yuritishga olamiz.

## Блог / Blog

### Korxona moliyaviy hisoboti auditi 2026
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/blog/obligatory-audit-guide-2026
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-15; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 8 daqiqa; Audit

Qaysi tashkilotlar auditdan o'tishi kerak, auditga qanday tayyorlanish va hisobda nimani o'zgartirish lozim? Yangi qonun bo'yicha tushuntirishlar va xatarlarni tahlil qilish bo'yicha amaliy tavsiyalar oling.

Majburiy audit — Oʻzbekistondagi biznes uchun eng muhim va koʻpincha notoʻgʻri tushuniladigan tartiblardan biri. Koʻplab kompaniyalar auditdan oʻtish zarurligini hisobotni topshirishdan bir necha hafta oldin bilib qoladi va shoshqaloqlik, ortiqcha toʻlovlar hamda xatoliklar girdobiga tushib qoladi. Ushbu qoʻllanmada kompaniya egasi va moliyaviy direktor bilishi kerak boʻlgan barcha narsalarni koʻrib chiqamiz.
## 2026-yilda kim auditdan oʻtishi shart
Oʻzbekiston Respublikasining «Auditorlik faoliyati toʻgʻrisida»gi Qonuni va qonunosti hujjatlariga muvofiq, quyidagilar majburiy auditdan oʻtishi shart:
- Barcha aksiyadorlik jamiyatlari (AJ) — ochiq va yopiq turdagi, hajmidan qatʼi nazar
- Banklar, kredit tashkilotlari va mikromoliya tashkilotlari
- Sugʻurta va qayta sugʻurta kompaniyalari
- Investitsiya, pay va pensiya jamgʻarmalari
- Birjalar va qimmatli qogʻozlar bozorining professional ishtirokchilari
- Davlat ulushi 50% dan ortiq boʻlgan tashkilotlar
- Tushum/aktivlar/xodimlar soni boʻyicha belgilangan chegaralardan oshib ketadigan yirik kompaniyalar (dolzarb qiymatlarni amaldagi qonunchilikdan qarang)
- MHXS boʻyicha konsolidatsiyalangan hisobotni eʼlon qilishi shart boʻlgan kompaniyalar
## Audit oʻtkazish muddatlari
Audit yillik moliyaviy hisobot topshirilgunga qadar yakunlangan boʻlishi kerak — aksariyat kompaniyalar uchun bu hisobot yilidan keyingi yilning aprel oyi oxiri hisoblanadi. Sifatli audit kompaniya hajmiga qarab 3-8 hafta davom etishini hisobga olib, jarayonni yanvar-fevral oylarida boshlashni tavsiya qilamiz.
## Auditdan oʻz vaqtida oʻtilmasa, nima boʻladi
Oqibatlar kompaniya turiga bogʻliq:
- OʻzR Maʼmuriy javobgarlik toʻgʻrisidagi kodeksiga muvofiq jarimalar
- Yillik hisobotni belgilangan muddatlarda topshirishning imkonsizligi
- Ayrim operatsiyalarning bloklanishi (moliya tashkilotlari uchun)
- Litsenziyaning yoʻqotilishi — banklar, sugʻurta kompaniyalari, investitsiya jamgʻarmalari uchun
- Keyingi tekshiruvlarda soliq xavflari — auditorlik xulosasisiz kompaniyaning nizolardagi pozitsiyasi zaiflashadi
- Davlat tenderlarida ishtirok etish va bank kreditlarini olishning imkonsizligi
## Auditorni qanday tanlash kerak
Oʻzbekistonda auditorlik kompaniyasini tanlashda quyidagilarni tekshiring:
1. OʻzR Moliya vazirligining amaldagi litsenziyasi mavjudligi — albatta
2. Kasbiy javobgarlikni sugʻurtalash — auditor xatosi yuz berganda zararni qoplash kafolati
3. Sizning sohangizda ish tajribasi — tibbiyot, IT, ishlab chiqarish va savdo oʻziga xos xususiyatlarga ega
4. Yetakchi auditorlarda xalqaro sertifikatlar (CAP, CIPA, DipIFR/ACCA) mavjudligi
5. Shaffof narx belgilash — shartnomada qatʼiy belgilangan summa, «hajm uchun qoʻshimcha toʻlovlar»siz
6. Oshkor qilmaslik toʻgʻrisidagi kelishuvni (NDA) imzolashga tayyorligi
7. Sizning sohangizdagi boshqa mijozlarning sharhlari va tavsiyalari
## Majburiy audit qancha turadi
Toshkentda audit narxi faoliyat hajmi, hisobot murakkabligi (NSBU yoki MHXS), soha, xoʻjalik operatsiyalari soni va filiallar mavjudligiga qarab keng diapazonda oʻzgaradi. Bir necha auditordan yozma tijoriy takliflar soʻrang va nafaqat narxni, balki ishlar tarkibini ham solishtiring.
## Sifatli auditga nimalar kiradi
Professional audit — bu hisobotni shunchaki rasmiy muvofiqlikka tekshirish emas. Sifatli audit quyidagilarni oʻz ichiga oladi:
- Kompaniyaning ichki nazorat tizimini tahlil qilish
- Muhim xoʻjalik operatsiyalarini tekshirish (testlash)
- Hisob standartlarini (NSBU yoki MHXS) qoʻllash toʻgʻriligini tekshirish
- Soliq xavflari va hisob-kitoblarini tahlil qilish
- Qonunchilik talablariga rioya etilishini baholash
- Auditorlik xulosasi — davlat organlari uchun rasmiy hujjat
- Aniqlangan buzilishlar toʻgʻrisida aniq tavsiyalar bilan batafsil hisobot
## Auditga tayyorgarlik chek-roʻyxati
1. Hisob davrini yopish va aylanma-saldo qaydnomasini shakllantirish
2. NSBU boʻyicha (va qoʻllanilsa, MHXS boʻyicha) moliyaviy hisobotni tayyorlash
3. Aktivlar va majburiyatlarni inventarizatsiya qilish
4. Muhim operatsiyalar boʻyicha birlamchi hujjatlarni yigʻish
5. Kontragentlar bilan tuzilgan shartnomalarning mavjudligi va toʻgʻriligini tekshirish
6. Debitorlar va kreditorlar bilan solishtiruv oʻtkazish
7. Davr uchun soliq hisob-kitoblari va deklaratsiyalarini tayyorlash
8. Kompaniya tomonidan auditorlar bilan muloqot uchun masʼul shaxsni tayinlash
## Xulosa
Majburiy audit — bu davlat uchun «belgi qoʻyish» emas, balki biznesni soliq, moliyaviy va obroʻ-eʼtibor xavflaridan himoya qilish vositasidir. Oʻz vaqtida oʻtkazilgan sifatli audit muammolarni ular qimmatga tushmasidan oldin aniqlash va bartaraf etish imkonini beradi. Agar sizda savollar qolgan boʻlsa yoki auditga tayyorgarlik boʻyicha maslahat kerak boʻlsa, Leader Audit mutaxassislari yordam berishga tayyor — birinchi maslahat bepul.

### O'zbekistonda QQS qaytarish: bosqichma-bosqich qo'llanma
URL: https://leaderaudit.uz/uz/blog/vat-refund-uzbekistan
Опубликовано/Published: 2026-04-10; обновлено/updated: 2026-04-27; 10 daqiqa; Soliqlar

O'zbekiston byudjetidan QQSni qaytarish — sezilarli mablag'ni qaytarib olish imkoniyati, ammo protsedura nuanslarga to'la. Hujjatlarni tayyorlashdan to mablag' hisobga tushgunigacha bo'lgan butun yo'lni tahlil qilamiz.

QQSni qaytarish — Oʻzbekistondagi biznes uchun eng foydali, biroq ayni paytda eng murakkab moliyaviy vositalardan biri. 200 milliard soʻmdan ortiq summadagi qaytarishlar boʻyicha tajribamizga koʻra, arizalarning qariyb uchdan biri texnik xatolar tufayli rad etiladi.
